MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JASON B. FRIEDMAN OF THE BRANDI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 989-1800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROWEN P. LIZIN OF THE LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, TEL. NO. 362-2580 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALLIEDBARTON SECURITY SERVICES LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiff's complaint pleads sufficient facts to support the claim for exemplary damages. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
